evals.name: architecture-diagram
evals.prompt: Create a visual diagram showing the architecture of a web app with a React frontend, Node.js API, PostgreSQL database, and Redis cache
evals.expected_output: Generates a self-contained HTML file in ~/.agent/diagrams/. Uses Mermaid or CSS Grid based on complexity. Picks a constrained aesthetic (Blueprint, Editorial, or Paper/ink). Does NOT use Inter/Roboto fonts or indigo/violet accents. Opens the file in the browser.

assertions.text: Output is a self-contained HTML file
Does not use Inter, Roboto, or system-ui as primary font
Does not use forbidden accent colors (indigo/violet/cyan-magenta-pink)
Opens the file in the browser after generation

evals.name: proactive-table-rendering
evals.prompt: Compare these 5 JavaScript frameworks: React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, and Solid. Include columns for bundle size, learning curve, ecosystem, and performance.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes this is a 5-row, 5-column table (exceeds 4+ rows / 3+ columns threshold). Proactively generates an HTML table instead of ASCII. Uses semantic <table> element with sticky headers, alternating row backgrounds, and row hover. Does NOT render as ASCII in the terminal.

assertions.text: Generates HTML table instead of ASCII
Uses semantic <table> element, not CSS Grid
Proactively renders without user asking for HTML

evals.name: anti-slop-enforcement
evals.prompt: Create a dashboard showing API metrics: request count, error rate, p99 latency, and uptime percentage
evals.expected_output: Generates a dashboard with KPI cards and visual hierarchy. Hero numbers for primary metrics, subdued treatment for secondary. Does NOT use: Inter font, gradient text on headings, emoji icons in headers, glowing animated shadows, cyan-magenta-pink color scheme, or three-dot code block chrome. Passes the Slop Test.

assertions.text: No gradient text (background-clip: text) on headings
Visual hierarchy varies card importance (hero vs supporting)

evals.name: mermaid-theming
evals.prompt: Create a flowchart showing a CI/CD pipeline: commit, lint, test, build, deploy to staging, approval, deploy to production
evals.expected_output: Uses Mermaid with theme: 'base' and custom themeVariables matching the page palette. Uses flowchart TD (not LR for 7+ nodes). Includes zoom controls. Centers the diagram with flex. Does NOT use Mermaid's default blue theme.

assertions.text: Uses Mermaid with theme: 'base' and custom themeVariables
Uses flowchart TD (not LR) for 7+ nodes
Page palette and Mermaid palette are coordinated
